training_status: blast and cruise cycle since late summer previous year

benefits.description: Huge difference in muscle growth when combined with proper diet, training form, sleep, and supplementation
Enhanced recovery through stimulation of GH and IGF-1 levels

side_effects.description: Gastrointestinal disturbance if dose is too high

protocol_notes: Uses CJC-1295/Ipamorelin with no DAC variant at 200-250mcg each. Stack includes: Nutricost L-arginine/L-ornithine, beta ecdysterone, Old School Labs turkesterone, 15g creatine, Transparent Labs or Bucked Up no-stim pre-workout. Follows keto/hunter-gatherer diet. Uses sauna/steam room to amplify effects. Wholistic doctor confirmed amazing hormone levels for age without steroid use. No side effects with proper titration. Advised fasting state pinning (2+ hours after meals). Notes that sauna/steam room amplifies peptide effects.
